ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-07-2015 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of 1st And Final Report And Account And Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Oct-28-2015 Off Calendar

Petition To Terminate Further Probate Administration And For Order Discharging Personal Representative
Off Calendar Sep-23-2015 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Edward Lee for and with (executor) Anthony McElligott.

The Court asked counsel if there was anything further regarding the examiner's notes and if he had responses regarding the termination and need for a final account and report. Mr. Lee stated that he looked online and did not see any examiner notes posted, that the Heggstad petition in Alameda County was granted, that a copy of the order was filed on 9/10/15, that there was confusion regarding the real property and whether it was in the trust or estate, that the Heggstad order clears the confusion and that the remaining property is only valued at $15,000.00. The petition to terminate further probate administration and for order discharging personal representative was taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition To Terminate Proceedings
Off Calendar Sep-08-2015 Off Calendar

Petition To Terminate Further Probate Administration And For Order Discharging Personal Representative
Off Calendar Sep-08-2015 Continued To Sep-22-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Off Calendar Jul-20-2015 Granted Per Written Order

Off Calendar Jun-16-2015 Off Calendar

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar May-19-2015 Continued To Jun-16-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Edward Lee for and with (Executor) Anthony McElligott.

Mr. Lee reported that they have been dealing with a parcel of real estate and whether the estate owns it or not, that they think it was intended to be part of a trust, that they have a Heggstad petition pending in Alameda County (hearing date of July, 28, 2015) and that the outcome will have a major effect on this case. The status report and status on filing of inventory & appraisal; petition for final distribution or report on status of administration was continued to June 16, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 with the expectation that either a petition for final distribution or a petition for extension of time will be on file at that time.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Inventory And Appraisal; Petition For Final Distribution Or Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Jan-13-2015 Continued To Apr-21-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Anthony McElligot in Propria Persona.

Mr. McElligot stated that his attorney is ill today and that he provided courtesy copies of report on status, the inventory and appraisal and waivers of accounting by the co-trustee and himself to the Probate Examiner's box in room 202 yesterday afternoon. Status on filing of the inventory and appraisal, petition for final distribution or report on status of administration was continued to April 21, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy S. Park. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Inventory And Appraisal; Petition For Final Distribution Or Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Oct-21-2014 Continued To Jan-13-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Edward Lee for and with Anthony McElligott.

The Court explained to Mr. Lee why the matter was before it and what needed to be done to bring this Estate to conclusion. Mr. Lee stated that he has a signed Substitution of Attorney but that it was not filed and that he will file it this morning. Status on filing of the inventory and appraisal; petition for final distribution, etc. was continued to January 13, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The order to appear is off calendar. The Court will issue an order lifting suspension of the Executor and revocation of letters.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Oct-21-2014 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Inventory And Appraisal; Petition For Final Distribution Or Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Sep-23-2014 Continued To Oct-21-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Executor Anthony McElligott to appear on October 21, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why the inventory and appraisal, petition for final distribution or report for status of administration has not been filed. The order to appear will include suspension of Mr. McElligott and will inform him that he must be represented by an Attorney to be re-appointed. The letters of administration are revoked as of today. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Inventory And Appraisal; Petition For Final Distribution Or Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Jun-24-2014 Continued To Sep-23-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Anthony McElligott in Propria Persona.

Mr. McElligott provided a request for appointment of a probate referee and order, and stated that the property was sold as a personal representative. The Court informed Mr. McElligott that he needs an appraisal, that statutory notice under Probate Code 9202 needs to be given and then a petition for final distribution needs to be filed which can be on a waiver of account if the Parties agree to it. Status on filing of petition for final distribution was continued to September 23, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Jun-24-2014 Off Calendar

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Jun-24-2014 Off Calendar

Off Calendar May-27-2014 Continued To Jun-24-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Anthony McElligot to appear on June 24, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 the petition for final distribution has not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar May-27-2014 Continued To Jun-24-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Inventory And Appraisal; Petition For Final Distribution Or Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Dec-03-2013 Continued To May-27-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Anthony McElligott in Propria Persona.

Mr. McElligott stated that it was too expensive to hire an Attorney, that it would cost $30,000.00, that he filed the Inventory and Appraisal this morning (endorsed copy provided), and that he has the Request and Order for Appointment of a Probate Referee. Status on filing of a Petition for Final Distribution was continued to May 27, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court directed Mr. McElligott to get notices out to the Franchise Tax Board and to other required entities pursuant to Probate Code 9202.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Dec-03-2013 Continued To May-27-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Inventory And Appraisal; Petition For Final Distribution Or Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Oct-22-2013 Continued To Dec-03-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Anthony McElligott in Propria Persona.

Mr. McElligott stated that he thought everything was in a living trust, that it is not and that he has not done anything. Mr. McElligott also stated that he opened the estate because he thought it was the right thing to do, and that the house in not in the trust but it was intended to be. The Court explained to Mr. McElligott what steps need to be taken and encouraged him to obtain a lawyer. Status of administration was continued to December 3, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Oct-22-2013 Continued To Dec-03-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
